insert:
authQuerier := authservice.NewSQLQuerier(pool)
	authSecrets := authservice.NewSecrets(configSvc)
	authSvc := authservice.New(authQuerier, authSecrets)
	authMailer := authmailer.New(authSecrets)
	authHandler := authhandlers.New(authSvc, authMailer)
	if jwtVerifier != nil {
		r.Use(auth.Authenticate(jwtVerifier))
	}
	r.Mount("/api/v1/auth", authHandler.Routes())
	authcron.Start(ctx, authQuerier)
